network.wrong: Wrong network. Switch to {{network}} to continue.

home.title: BitChicken
home.subtitle: Hatch unique Chickens from eggs, pair them up on the farm and collect your production every cycle.

step1.title: Connect wallet
step1.desc: Link any Web3 wallet. No signup required.

step2.title: Open an egg
step2.desc: Pick an egg level for a surprise Chicken. Special Editions have a low chance of dropping from any egg.

step3.title: Lodge pairs
step3.desc: Lodge a male and a female Chicken to start earning production.

step4.title: Collect rewards
step4.desc: Collect your BCKN token production every production cycle.

store.normalHint: Pick an egg level and open it for a surprise Chicken. Special Editions have a low chance of dropping from any egg.
store.nameHint: Required. 1-24 letters, numbers or spaces (no accents or symbols).
store.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to get a Chicken.
store.hatchingDesc: Your egg is hatching. This may take a few moments. Check your wallet.
store.awaitTimeout: It's taking longer than expected. Your Chicken will appear in your inventory shortly.

farm.title: My Farm
farm.noNfts: You don't have any Chickens yet. Get one from the store to start.
farm.noPairs: You have no lodged pairs yet.
farm.coopHint: Drag a chicken into a nest, or tap Place.
farm.needBoth: Place one ♂ and one ♀ to lodge
farm.onlyMales: You only have males — you need a female to lodge.
farm.onlyFemales: You only have females — you need a male to lodge.
farm.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to access the farm.

collection.title: Collection
collection.subtitle: Track your Chicken collection. Collect every species and build the perfect farm.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Buy and sell Chickens.
marketplace.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to trade Chickens.

referral.title: Referral Program
referral.noCode: You don't have a referral code yet. Register to start earning BNB referral rewards.
referral.nextLevel: {{count}} more referral(s) to the next level.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: BitChicken is a gamified farming game on BNB Smart Chain. Hatch unique Chickens from eggs, lodge pairs on the farm to earn BCKN production, and trade them on the market.
faq.a2: Lodge one male and one female Chicken on the farm. Every production cycle you can collect your BCKN production, which is based on the combined attributes of the couple.
faq.q3: How does the referral program work?
faq.a3: Register a referral code on your farm and share your invite link with the code. When a referred user gets their first Chicken using your link, you earn a BNB slice of the price — 2% to 10%, based on your level.
faq.a4: BCKN has an emission cap. A portion of each production collection is burned, creating deflationary pressure.
faq.a5: Any Web3 wallet compatible with Reown AppKit, including MetaMask, Trust Wallet, WalletConnect-enabled wallets and many others.
faq.a6: No. Chickens lodged on the farm are held in the staking contract, not by us. The marketplace is non-custodial.
faq.a7: The contracts are backed by an extensive automated test suite. A formal third-party audit has not been published yet.
faq.q8: Where can I see the contracts?
faq.a8: Contract addresses are published in the app configuration and can be viewed on the BNB Smart Chain explorer.
faq.a9: After lodging a pair, you must wait one full production cycle before collecting production. Production accumulates in cycles.

risk.title: Risk disclosure
risk.item1: NFTs and crypto assets are volatile. You may lose some or all of your investment.
risk.item2: On-chain transactions are irreversible; always check amounts before confirming.
risk.item3: Smart contracts may contain flaws, even when extensively tested.
risk.item4: Check the regulations that apply in your jurisdiction before participating.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.p1: This site is a decentralized interface to interact with contracts on BNB Smart Chain. We custody neither funds nor keys.
terms.p2: You are solely responsible for your wallet security and your investment decisions.
terms.p3: Nothing here is financial advice. Use at your own risk.

onboarding.title: Welcome to BitChicken
onboarding.intro: Get started in a few simple steps:
onboarding.step2: Open an egg to hatch a Chicken — pick the level that fits your budget.
onboarding.step3: Lodge a male and a female Chicken on the farm to start earning BCKN production every cycle.
onboarding.step4: Share your referral link and earn BNB when your referred users get their first Chicken.
onboarding.step5: Trade Chickens on the market. The ecosystem is fully on-chain.

share.subject: BitChicken invite
share.message: Check out BitChicken on BNB Smart Chain. Use my referral link to start:

walletLink.title: Link your wallet
walletLink.description: To access the farm and perform on-chain actions you need to link your wallet to your account. Your wallet will ask you to sign a message — no transaction will be sent and no funds moved.
